title: linum australe var. australe
intro: Linum australe var. australe, also known as Blue Flax or Blue Ribbon Flax, is a flowering plant species within the Linaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Linum australe var. australe include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its antiseptic properties which can help prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Linum australe var. australe can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including skin issues and respiratory problems.
